descs.desc:
At 10+ Charge Count, deal +10% damage
At 15+ Charge Count, deal additional +10% damage

coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttackHead] At 10+ Charge Count, inflict 1 Slash Fragility
[OnSucceedAttack] If target’s HP is below 30%, deal +15% damage

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain +6 Charge Count
At 10+ Charge Count, gain +1 Coin Power
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] At 10+ Charge Count, inflict 1 Slash Fragility

[OnSucceedAttack] If target’s HP is below 30%, deal +20% damage
[EnemyKill] Gain 1 Haste next turn

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain +7 Charge Count
At 10+ Charge Count, gain +1 Coin Power
At 15+ Charge Count, gain additional +1 Coin Power
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] At 10+ Charge Count, inflict 2 Slash Fragility

[OnSucceedAttack] If target’s HP is below 30%, deal +30% damage
[EnemyKill] Gain 3 Haste next turn

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] At 7~14 Charge Count
Consume all Charge Count,
And consume 3 x (15 - Charge Count Consumed)% HP to gain +3 Coin Power
[WhenUse] Consume 15 Charge Count to gain +3 Coin Power
coinDescs: [EnemyKill] If the skill consumed 15 Charge Count upon use, apply 5 Charge Barrier to self and 1 other ally

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] At 7~14 Charge Count
Consume all Charge Count,
And consume 3 x (15 - Charge Count Consumed)% HP to gain +5 Coin Power
[WhenUse] Consume 15 Charge Count to gain +5 Coin Power
coinDescs: [EnemyKill] If the skill consumed 15 Charge Count upon use, apply 7 Charge Barrier to self and 1 other ally

1040501.name: Dimensional Demon Edge
1040501.desc: Upon defeating an enemy, gain +2 Charge Count (3 times per turn)

1040521.name: Dimensional Refraction Edge - Type: Blade Mk7
1040521.desc: When an ally with the lowest Max HP defeats an enemy, they gain +2 Charge Count (Once per turn)
